text: PNW doctor from hantavirus ship taken to special isolation unit - The Seattle Times
fullText: An oncologist traveling on a cruise ship amid a hantavirus outbreak says he's the lone American isolated at a special biocontainment unit in Nebraska.

text: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh’s murder convictions in deaths of wife, son - The Washington Post

text: 'Too dangerous to ever be free' - Utah mum who poisoned husband sentenced to life - BBC

text: NY Rep. Mike Lawler recounts antisemitic insults from Rand Paul’s son at DC bar - Courthouse News
fullText: The Republican congressman said he was out at a local Washington bar with a reporter and a friend when a man identifying himself as William Paul went on a “ten-minute diatribe” in which he said he hated Jewish and LGBTQ people.

text: Apple Releases iOS 26.5: New Update Adds Long-Awaited Feature For iPhone - Forbes

text: Gunfire heard at Philippine Senate amid standoff with lawmaker facing arrest - The Washington Post

text: Allegiant CEO makes case for low-cost airline model as Sun Country acquisition closes - CNBC

text: Instagram hits the copy button again with new disappearing Instants photos - The Verge
fullText: Instagram is once again cribbing from competitors like Snapchat and BeReal with a new ephemeral photo-sharing format it calls “Instants.” It’s available in Instagram and as a dedicated app.
